proposal.hypothesis: Decrease lateralVelocityGain by one bounded step.
proposal.expectedEffect: Test whether lateralVelocityGain=-0.1 improves the complete locked quadruped score.

gateReasons: reset-d: survival 0.656 below gate without improving the current best
reverse-strong-push: survival 0.656 below gate without improving the current best
delay-plus-push: lateral drift 0.480 exceeds gate without improving the current best
delay-plus-reset: lateral drift 0.467 exceeds gate without improving the current best
